shortDesc: Join us for a community health screening on Jan 20.
longDesc: This camp will provide free checkups, consultations, and basic lab tests for the community.

shortDesc: State-of-the-art imaging now available at our Radiology Department.

shortDesc: Support lives by donating blood this February.
